customer:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.customer (
	customer_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	customer_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, 
	tax_code VARCHAR(15), 
	address TEXT, 
	province_id INTEGER, 
	customer_tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'STANDARD'::character varying, 
	is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(), 
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(), 
	CONSTRAINT customer_pkey PRIMARY KEY (customer_code), 
	CONSTRAINT customer_province_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY(province_id) REFERENCES tnbike.province (province_id)
)

email_log:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.email_log (
	log_id BIGSERIAL NOT NULL, 
	message_id TEXT, 
	from_address TEXT, 
	received_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, 
	attachment_name TEXT, 
	processing_status VARCHAR(50), 
	CONSTRAINT email_log_pkey PRIMARY KEY (log_id)
)

fact_sales:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.fact_sales (
	fact_id BIGSERIAL NOT NULL, 
	order_date DATE NOT NULL, 
	fiscal_year SMALLINT NOT NULL, 
	fiscal_quarter SMALLINT NOT NULL, 
	fiscal_month SMALLINT NOT NULL, 
	week_of_year SMALLINT, 
	so_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	order_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	line_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	customer_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	customer_name VARCHAR(200), 
	province_id INTEGER, 
	province_name VARCHAR(100), 
	region VARCHAR(50), 
	product_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	product_name VARCHAR(200), 
	color VARCHAR(60), 
	line_id_fk INTEGER, 
	line_name VARCHAR(100), 
	group_code VARCHAR(30), 
	group_name VARCHAR(100), 
	quantity NUMERIC(10, 2) NOT NULL, 
	unit_price NUMERIC(15, 2) NOT NULL, 
	line_total NUMERIC(15, 2) NOT NULL, 
	base_color VARCHAR(60), 
	CONSTRAINT fact_sales_pkey PRIMARY KEY (fact_id)
)

order_line:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.order_line (
	line_id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	order_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	so_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	product_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	quantity NUMERIC(10, 2) NOT NULL, 
	unit_price NUMERIC(15, 2) NOT NULL, 
	line_total NUMERIC(15, 2) NOT NULL, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(), 
	CONSTRAINT order_line_pkey PRIMARY KEY (line_id), 
	CONSTRAINT order_line_order_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY(order_id) REFERENCES tnbike.sales_order (order_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, 
	CONSTRAINT order_line_product_code_fkey FOREIGN KEY(product_code) REFERENCES tnbike.product (product_code), 
	CONSTRAINT order_line_quantity_check CHECK (quantity > 0::numeric), 
	CONSTRAINT order_line_unit_price_check CHECK (unit_price >= 0::numeric)
)

product:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.product (
	product_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	product_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, 
	line_id INTEGER, 
	color VARCHAR(60), 
	unit VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'Chiếc'::character varying, 
	is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(), 
	base_color VARCHAR(60), 
	CONSTRAINT product_pkey PRIMARY KEY (product_code), 
	CONSTRAINT product_line_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY(line_id) REFERENCES tnbike.product_line (line_id)
)

product_group:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.product_group (
	group_code VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, 
	group_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, 
	description TEXT, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(), 
	CONSTRAINT product_group_pkey PRIMARY KEY (group_code)
)

product_line:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.product_line (
	line_id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	line_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, 
	group_code VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(), 
	CONSTRAINT product_line_pkey PRIMARY KEY (line_id), 
	CONSTRAINT product_line_group_code_fkey FOREIGN KEY(group_code) REFERENCES tnbike.product_group (group_code), 
	CONSTRAINT product_line_line_name_group_code_key UNIQUE (line_name, group_code)
)

product_price:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.product_price (
	price_id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	product_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	unit_price NUMERIC(15, 2) NOT NULL, 
	effective_from DATE NOT NULL, 
	effective_to DATE, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(), 
	CONSTRAINT product_price_pkey PRIMARY KEY (price_id), 
	CONSTRAINT product_price_product_code_fkey FOREIGN KEY(product_code) REFERENCES tnbike.product (product_code), 
	CONSTRAINT chk_price_dates CHECK (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to > effective_from), 
	CONSTRAINT product_price_unit_price_check CHECK (unit_price > 0::numeric)
)

province:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.province (
	province_id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	province_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, 
	region VARCHAR(50), 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(), 
	CONSTRAINT province_pkey PRIMARY KEY (province_id), 
	CONSTRAINT province_province_name_key UNIQUE (province_name)
)

sales_order:
CREATE TABLE tnbike.sales_order (
	order_id SERIAL NOT NULL, 
	so_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	invoice_symbol VARCHAR(15), 
	invoice_number VARCHAR(20), 
	order_date DATE NOT NULL, 
	customer_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	total_amount NUMERIC(15, 2), 
	total_quantity INTEGER, 
	line_count INTEGER, 
	fiscal_year SMALLINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((EXTRACT(year FROM order_date))::smallint) STORED, 
	fiscal_month SMALLINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((EXTRACT(month FROM order_date))::smallint) STORED, 
	fiscal_quarter SMALLINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((EXTRACT(quarter FROM order_date))::smallint) STORED, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(), 
	CONSTRAINT sales_order_pkey PRIMARY KEY (order_id), 
	CONSTRAINT sales_order_customer_code_fkey FOREIGN KEY(customer_code) REFERENCES tnbike.customer (customer_code), 
	CONSTRAINT sales_order_so_number_key UNIQUE (so_number)
)
